data.title: SKF publishes Annual and Sustainability Report 2025
data.description: The Annual and Sustainability Report 2025 of AB SKF has recently been released on the company's website based in Gothenburg, Sweden, on March 6, 2026. This report highlights SKF's value creation efforts for its customers, shareholders, and other stakeholders. It offers detailed information on the company's activities throughout the year, showcasing its commitment to sustainability and long-term growth. Readers can now access this report online to gain a deeper understanding of SKF's performance with key figures and strategies presented.

data.title: Feng Xingya, the Chairman of GAC Group: Enhance global competitiveness of China's automotive industry by "Going Global with Standards"
data.description: On March 6, 2026, Feng Xingya, a delegate to the National People's Congress and Chair of GAC Group, has reached Beijing for the 2026 National Two Sessions. During this event, he presented various suggestions regarding enhancing the automotive sector's high-quality growth and refining other areas.

data.title: ElevenLabs unveils Eleven Multilingual v2 with 28-language AI voice model, exiting beta post $500M Series D at $11B valuation.
data.description: ElevenLabs has unveiled Eleven Multilingual v2, featuring support for an impressive 28 languages. The release comes as the company transitions out of beta phase, a few weeks subsequent to successfully closing a $500 million Series D funding round. This funding has led to the company achieving a valuation of $11 billion.

data.title: Strategic Investor Agrees to $80 Million Investment in the Company at $2.00 Per Share, Preliminary Participation in Management, Followed by Subsequent Crypto Contribution
data.description: Hangzhou-based company Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: JZXN) has recently finalized an investment deal with a prominent strategic investor in the crypto asset and treasury management sectors. The agreement involves the purchase of 40 million ordinary shares of Jiuzi at $2.00 per share, totaling $80 million in cash. Following the completion of this initial investment, the strategic investor has begun getting involved in Jiuzi's operations and a mutual agreement has been reached regarding future Crypto contributions. The strategic investor possesses significant global influence in the specified fields.

data.title: Cyngn Awarded 24th Patent, Strengthening Universal Autonomy Capabilities
data.description: In Mountain View, California on March 6, 2026, Cyngn (Nasdaq: CYN) disclosed the receipt of a recent U.S. patent, US-12530029-B2, labeled "System and Method of Adaptive, Real-Time Vehicle System Identification for Autonomous Driving." This development marks a significant milestone for Cyngn's intellectual property portfolio.

data.title: Hytera Announces 450Connect Whitelisting of PNC660 450MHz at MWC 2026
data.description: During MWC26 in Barcelona, Spain, Hytera revealed that its PNC660 450MHz, a mission-critical smart device, received whitelist certification from 450Connect. This certification highlights the device's compatibility and approval for use on the 450MHz network.
